title: Attention Is All You Need
author: Vaswani et al.
notes: The foundational transformer paper. Key insight: self-attention can replace recurrence entirely.

title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
author: Kaplan et al.
notes: Power-law relationships between model size, data, compute, and performance.

title: The Bitter Lesson
author: Rich Sutton
notes: General methods that leverage computation are ultimately the most effective.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
notes: Currently on distributed systems chapters. Excellent reference for system design.

title: Deep Learning
author: Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville
notes: The standard textbook. Dense but comprehensive on foundations.

title: The Art of Doing Science and Engineering
author: Richard Hamming
